scripts.build: pnpm --filter spawntree-core run build && pnpm --filter spawntree-daemon run build && pnpm --filter spawntree run build && pnpm --filter spawntree-web run build:only
scripts.typecheck: pnpm --filter spawntree-core run build && pnpm --filter spawntree-daemon run build && tsc -p packages/cli/tsconfig.json --noEmit && tsc -p packages/web/tsconfig.json --noEmit
